description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box with a predominantly orange and cream color scheme, featuring the Dr. Oetker brand prominently on the front. The front face displays the product name 'Brownies Choco' along with an appetizing image of two chocolate brownies, suggesting the contents are a baking mix. The sides of the box provide detailed ingredient lists, preparation instructions, and nutritional information, all printed in clear, legible fonts. The back of the box is filled with step-by-step preparation graphics and additional product information. The packaging is glossy and smooth, with a hard, sturdy feel typical of food-grade cardboard. The box is sealed at the top and bottom, with no visible cap or spout, and is designed to be opened by tearing or cutting.
description: A rectangular, glossy cardboard box for Dr. Oetker Brownies Choco mix, featuring vivid product imagery and detailed instructions on all sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing the ingredients list and some product branding.
description_view_1: Front view with the Dr. Oetker logo, product name, and a photo of chocolate brownies.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with additional product information and branding.
description_view_3: Back view displaying preparation instructions, graphics, and a nutritional information panel.
